title: zantedeschia valida
intro: Zantedeschia valida, also known as the Golden Arum, is a plant species that belongs to the family Arum. The plant is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its alkaloid content. Its health benefits include its potential use in treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves or rhizomes in hot water.
